reviews.comment:
Anteriormente califique con 5 estrellas. Pero ahora le daría 1 por la calidad del combustible en mi caso diesel. Muy mala calidad y yo creía que estaba cargando buen combustible. Una decepción!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I previously gave it 5 stars. But now I'd give it 1 star because of the fuel quality—in my case, diesel. Very poor quality, and I thought I was getting good fuel. A disappointment!

reviews.comment:
Sin organizados para que no se forme la fila de autos fuera de la playa,no siempre lo logran ,pero no por falta de voluntad,sino mucho caudal de autos.

(Translated by Google)
They organize to prevent lines of cars from forming outside the beach, but they don't always succeed, not for lack of will, but because of the large volume of cars.
